title: polypodium deflexum
intro: Polypodium deflexum, also known as the Black Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The health benefits of Polypodium deflexum include its ability to improve respiratory health, boost the immune system, and even help to prevent certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Polypodium deflexum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from skin irritations to respiratory infections.
